Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Charity]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Charity is the Sage of the Silver Heart and mistress of the castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Charity speaks for the Akura family and humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Charity is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Charity can manipulate a chisel with her finger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Charity possesses a condensed sword aura around her chisel.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Charity once pitted the Seishen Kingdom against the Winter’s Blade sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Charity has a nephew who met a horrible fate at the hands of a brute.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Akura Charity possesses the Book of the Silver Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Akura Charity's Book of the Silver Heart contains seven techniques of shadow and dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Akura Charity is part of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Akura Charity owns the Night Wheel Valley and its vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Akura Charity stepped out of the shadows in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Charity has a map.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Akura Charity would not hold deaths against anyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Charity is a genius in the line of Malice who failed to activate the first book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Charity's robes are silken black with glowing violet lines that look like script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Akura Charity announced a team.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Charity assured Lindon he would be safe in the dungeon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Charity materialized from darkness in the center of Lindon's basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Charity has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Charity possesses Archlord's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Akura Charity stole the only young Underlords worth anything to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Charity is the Heart Sage.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Akura Charity is part of Mercy's family and is described as unknowable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Charity is dressed like a peasant worker.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Charity wears black, white, and violet sacred artist robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Charity's father is being lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Charity's father is ascending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Charity accused the Kingdom of Seishen of conspiracy to assassinate members of the Akura head family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Charity was a Sage before Lindon or his father were born.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Charity observed the Hollow King outside Sacred Valley.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Charity has a personal collection of natural treasures.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
